title: Public beta!
content:
Website is live and available publicly with the following functionality:
- Browse and search community builds for The Bazaar
- Upload your own builds with screenshots
- Comprehensive item database with filtering by hero, tier, size, and tags
- Like system to show support for your favorite builds
- User profiles to showcase personal build collections
- User authentication with email/password sign-in
- Feedback system for feature requests and bug reports
- Real-time build statistics with total builds and build rates per item
- Detailed item pages with synergy information and related builds

title: User Guides + YouTube Linking + Misc
content:
Added the following functionality:
- Updated homepage hero images and links to their builds
- You can now write a guide/commentary when uploading a build
- You can now link a youtube video when uploading a build
- Link in the Build Detail page to report errors in hero/item tagging
- Added link to Twitter account in the navbar
- Updated footer with additional links

title: Heroes Page v1
content:
- Heroes page with all heroes, # of builds for each, and most popular items
- Updated footer and navbar with links to new page

title: Social Links, Tooltips, and Keyword Filter
content:
- Added social links to My Builds page
- Updated Account settings page input fields for social links
- Added tooltips when hovering items in builds and the item database age
- Added filter by keyword (e.g. Freeze, Poison, etc) to Item Database and Upload a Build pages

title: Updates for patch 9.0
content:
- Added new items and updated existing item descriptions
- Added Hero Detail pages with latest builds, popular items, etc
- Updated homepage with additional sections going over main website features
- Added a filter for ‘Builds with Guides’

title: Upload Build QoL Updates + Twitter social link
content:
- Added ‘clear filters’ button to Upload Build page
- Updated mobile layout of Upload Build page
- Added 'Twitter/X' link in Account Settings and My Builds page

title: Image recognition functionality v1
content:
- New builds are automatically tagged with # of wins, victory type (bronze, gold, etc), and max health.
- If the system can't recognize one of the values, there's a place for an admin to later tag the build.
- Updated Build Detail page to display this information.
- Updated hero selector filter in the Builds, Items, and My Builds pages to make it tighter and move visually pleasing

title: Achievements System + Tier List
content:
Added an achievement system for BazaarForge users based on the builds they upload to the website.
- Each achievement has a Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond, and Legend levels.
- Account-wide achievements and hero-specific
- Achievements can be seen in dedicated Achievements page
- Added 'Achievement Points' indicator to My Builds page

Added a Tier List page for each hero that split items into tiers based on their % Builds metric for their respective hero.
- S Tier: ≥30%
- A Tier: 22-30%
- B Tier: 15-22%
- C Tier: 8-15%
- D Tier: 3-8%
- F Tier: <3%

title: Skills Database + QoL Updates
content:
- Added Quest and Enchantments information to all items
- Added Skills database
- Updated Hero Detail page with brief description of popular tags and strategies for each hero
- Fixed sign in using Google OAuth that had been broken for a few days

title: Leaderboard Page
content:
Added a Leaderboard page to showcase the top 100 builds with the highest Health, Level, Income, and Gold values.
- Started capturing Level, Income, and Gold for new builds via image reading
- Ran a script to attach the proper Level, Income, and Gold values for previously submitted pages

title: News Page
content:
- Added a News page to cover Patch Notes, News, Guides, etc
- Updated the sidebar with subcategories for easier navigation
- Made a variety of small quality-of-life updates throughout the website

title: Global Search Bar
content:
- Added global search bar (items, skills, heroes) in the top bar 
- Added images for most missing items
- Updated homepage with latest articles

title: Monster Database
content:
Added a Monsters database page with most Monsters (still missing special encounters like Temple Expedition encounters)
- Updated the Navbar and Footer with links to new Monsters page
- Updated global search bar in the top bar (desktop) to include Monster results
- Updated Item Detail and Skill Detail pages with 'How to obtain' information linking to Monsters that drop that item/skill
- Added a Monster Detail page for SEO purposes

title: Merchants Database
content:
Added a Merchants database page with all Merchants and Trainers
- Updated the Navbar and Footer with links to new Merchants page
- Updated global search bar in the top bar (desktop) to include Merchants in results
- Updated the 'Where to Find' section of the Item Detail and Skill Detail pages to link to Merchants that sell that item/skill
- Added a Merchant Detail page for SEO purposes
